content.speakerText: Could I get your name and phone number, please?
content.speakerTextCn: 能告诉我您的姓名和电话吗？
expectedAnswers: I'm Lisa Chen. You can reach me at 555-0192.
Lisa Chen. My number is five-five-five-zero-one-nine-two.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：准确提供了姓名和电话号码
语言准确性：姓名拼写正确，电话号码逐字清晰念出
表达自然度：语调自然，符合日常口语习惯，无机械感

content.speakerText: We need to register your details. Could you give me your full name and a contact number?
content.speakerTextCn: 我们需要登记您的信息，请提供您的全名和一个联系方式？
expectedAnswers: My name is David Park. You can call me at seven-seven-seven-two-two-two-three.
I'm David Park. My phone is seven-seven-seven-two-two-two-three.
David Park. Reach me at 777-2223 — that's seven-seven-seven-two-two-two-three.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：完整提供全名和电话号码
语言准确性：姓名格式正确（名+姓），电话号码逐字清晰表达
表达自然度：使用了恰当的连接词和语调，符合服务场景的礼貌性

content.speakerText: For our system, I'll need your name and a number to reach you.
content.speakerTextCn: 为了我们的系统，我需要您的姓名和一个可以联系到您的电话号码。
expectedAnswers: I'm Maria Lopez. My number is one-two-three-four-five-six-seven.
Maria Lopez. Call me at 123-4567 — one-two-three-four-five-six-seven.
You can contact me at Maria Lopez, one-two-three-four-five-six-seven.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：明确提供了姓名和电话号码
语言准确性：姓名结构完整，电话号码按数字逐字念出
表达自然度：语句流畅，无语法错误，符合真实对话节奏
